_key.description: Unique node identifier. Format: 'filename:type:counter' for CPG nodes, 'metric:kind:counter' for metric nodes, plain integer string for spine nodes.

type.description: Semantic node type from the Lua CPG builder.

symbol_id.description: Tree-sitter AST node id of the originating node. Null for metric nodes.

text.description: Source text of the AST node, or empty string for metric nodes.

start_byte.description: Byte offset of the node's first character in the source file. Null for synthetic nodes (directory, file spine nodes, metric nodes).

end_byte.description: Byte offset one past the node's last character in the source file. Null for synthetic nodes (directory, file spine nodes, metric nodes).

file_path.description: Absolute or relative path of the source file this node belongs to.

properties.description: Type-specific metadata. Shape varies by node type.

name.description: Symbol name — present on functions, variables, identifiers, calls, and index_expression nodes.

kind.description: Sub-classification. Control structures: AST node type string (e.g. 'if_statement'). Metrics: 'function' | 'chunk' | 'project'. Literals: 'number' | 'string' | 'true' | 'false' | 'nil'.

initialized.description: Set to 'True' when a local_variable_declaration has an initializer expression.

is_table.description: Set to 'True' when a local_variable_declaration is initialized from a table constructor.

module_path.description: Dotted module path for module_import nodes (e.g. 'math.utils').

module_name.description: The module's own declared name for module nodes.

field.description: For index_expression (dot access): the field name after the dot.

table_keys.description: Comma-separated field keys for table_constructor nodes.

value.description: Raw source text of a literal node.

write.description: Set to 'True' on identifier nodes on the left-hand side of an assignment.

halstead_metrics.description: Halstead complexity metrics (n1, n2, N1, N2, V, D, E, T, B).

loc.description: Lines-of-code breakdown (total, blank, commented, code, comment_pct).

cyclomatic_complexity.description: McCabe cyclomatic complexity of the node's subtree.

variable_metrics.description: Variable usage for function nodes (local_vars_current, local_vars_nested, params).

dependency.description: Inter-function dependency metrics (depends_on, depended_by arrays of node IDs).

statement_usage.description: Statement-type frequency counts (GenericFor, NumericFor, If, Assign, LocalAssign, FunctionCall, LocalFunction, GlobalFunction).

function_counts.description: Function-definition counts per chunk (total, global, local).

num_files.description: Project-level metric: total number of file nodes in the graph.

num_modules.description: Project-level metric: total number of module nodes in the graph.

avg_functions_per_file.description: Project-level metric: average function count across all chunks.

max_functions_in_file.description: Project-level metric: maximum function count in any single chunk.

min_functions_in_file.description: Project-level metric: minimum function count in any single chunk.

avg_lines_per_function.description: Project-level metric: average total LOC per function.

avg_comment_pct.description: Project-level metric: average comment percentage across all chunks.
